repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.api-design: resource modeling, naming consistency, versioning strategy, pagination patterns, error envelope, idempotency keys, contract-first OpenAPI, evolvability
fix a Postgres deadlock in the migration

retrieval_query: api design resource modeling versioning pagination idempotency error envelope contract-first openapi evolvability

validation_smoke.name: code.api-design L3 validation smoke
signals: a consumer can navigate the resource model from names alone without reading implementation code
an additive change to the contract does not break an existing client's generated code
retrying a write with the same idempotency key returns the original result, not a duplicate
the OpenAPI document validates and round-trips to generated client and server stubs

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.api-design diagnosis smoke
signals: two endpoints model the same concept with different field names or casing
a client breaks because a field's type changed within the same API version
a list endpoint returns the whole collection with no pagination contract
errors arrive in inconsistent shapes so clients cannot parse them uniformly
a duplicate order is created when a client retries a request after a timeout
